ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Model_Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    self.setDescription("Personal bowl of " .. self.getName())
    Wait.time(updateTooltip, 1.0, -1)
end
function filterObjectEnter(obj)
    local n = obj.getName() or ""
    if string.match(n,"Spoon") or string.match(n,"Cuchara") or string.match(n,"Control") or
       string.match(n,"Bowl") or string.match(n,"Tazón") or string.match(n,"Box") or 
       string.match(n,"Figurine") or string.match(n,"Shop") or string.match(n,"Toy") then
        return false
    end
    return true
end
function onObjectEnterContainer(container, obj)
    if container == self then
        printToAll("+" .. obj.getName() .. " entered " .. self.getName(), {0.6,1,0.6})
    end
end
function updateTooltip()
    if self==nil or self.getGUID()==nil then return false end
    local counts={["Cereal Cookie"]=0, ["Cereal Fruity"]=0, ["Cereal Choco"]=0, ["Cereal Frosted"]=0, ["Cereal Honey"]=0, ["Cereal Candy"]=0, ["Flake"]=0, ["Marshmallow"]=0}
    for _,obj in ipairs(self.getObjects()) do
        for k,_ in pairs(counts) do 
            if string.match(obj.name,k) then counts[k]=counts[k]+1; break end 
        end
    end
    local desc = "Contents:\n"
    local empty = true
    for k, v in pairs(counts) do
        if v > 0 then
            desc = desc .. "- " .. k .. ": " .. v .. "\n"
            empty = false
        end
    end
    if empty then desc = desc .. "(Empty)" end
    self.setDescription(desc)
    return true
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Model
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    self.setDescription("Main tool: Scoop and Extract")
    self.createButton({click_function="takeScoop",function_owner=self,label="Scoop",position={0,0.8,-1.4},width=500,height=300,font_size=120,color={1,1,1},font_color={0,0,0},tooltip="Scoop from a bowl"})
    local buttons={
        {label="Co",func="sCookie",col="Cereal Cookie",rgb={0.8, 0.6, 0.4},font={0,0,0},p={-0.80,0.8,-0.70}},
        {label="Fr",func="sFruity",col="Cereal Fruity",rgb={1.0, 0.4, 0.6},font={0,0,0},p={-0.27,0.8,-0.70}},
        {label="Ch",func="sChoco",col="Cereal Choco",rgb={0.4, 0.2, 0.1},font={1,1,1},p={0.27,0.8,-0.70}},
        {label="Fs",func="sFrosted",col="Cereal Frosted",rgb={0.9, 0.9, 1.0},font={0,0,0},p={0.80,0.8,-0.70}},
        {label="Ho",func="sHoney",col="Cereal Honey",rgb={1.0, 0.8, 0.2},font={0,0,0},p={-0.60,0.8,-0.30}},
        {label="Ca",func="sCandy",col="Cereal Candy",rgb={1.0, 0.2, 0.4},font={1,1,1},p={-0.20,0.8,-0.30}},
        {label="Fl",func="sFlk",col="Flake",rgb={0.8,0.8,0.6},font={0,0,0},p={0.20,0.8,-0.30}},
        {label="M",func="sMarsh",col="Marshmallow",rgb={1,0.5,0.8},font={0,0,0},p={0.60,0.8,-0.30}}
    }
    for _,b in ipairs(buttons) do
        self.createButton({click_function=b.func,function_owner=self,label=b.label,position=b.p,
            width=160,height=160,font_size=90,color=b.rgb,font_color=b.font,tooltip="Take "..b.col})
    end
    Wait.time(updateTooltips, 1.0, -1)
end
function updateTooltips()
    if self==nil or self.getGUID()==nil then return false end
    local owner=self.getName():gsub("Spoon ","")
    local my_bowl=nil
    for _,o in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do if o.getName()=="Bowl "..owner then my_bowl=o;break end end
    if not my_bowl then return true end
    local counts={["Cereal Cookie"]=0, ["Cereal Fruity"]=0, ["Cereal Choco"]=0, ["Cereal Frosted"]=0, ["Cereal Honey"]=0, ["Cereal Candy"]=0, ["Flake"]=0, ["Marshmallow"]=0}
    for _,obj in ipairs(my_bowl.getObjects()) do
        for k,_ in pairs(counts) do if string.match(obj.name,k) then counts[k]=counts[k]+1;break end end
    end
    self.editButton({index=1, tooltip="Take Cereal Cookie ("..counts["Cereal Cookie"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=2, tooltip="Take Cereal Fruity ("..counts["Cereal Fruity"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=3, tooltip="Take Cereal Choco ("..counts["Cereal Choco"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=4, tooltip="Take Cereal Frosted ("..counts["Cereal Frosted"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=5, tooltip="Take Cereal Honey ("..counts["Cereal Honey"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=6, tooltip="Take Cereal Candy ("..counts["Cereal Candy"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=7, tooltip="Take Flake ("..counts["Flake"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=8, tooltip="Take Marshmallow ("..counts["Marshmallow"]..")"})
    return true
end
function sCookie(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Cookie",c) end
function sFruity(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Fruity",c) end
function sChoco(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Choco",c) end
function sFrosted(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Frosted",c) end
function sHoney(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Honey",c) end
function sCandy(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Candy",c) end
function sFlk(o,c) extractPiece("Flake",c) end
function sMarsh(o,c) extractPiece("Marshmallow",c) end
function extractPiece(term,player_color)
    local owner=self.getName():gsub("Spoon ","")
    local my_bowl=nil
    for _,o in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do if o.getName()=="Bowl "..owner then my_bowl=o;break end end
    if not my_bowl then broadcastToColor("Your bowl was not found.",player_color,"Red");return end
    local content=my_bowl.getObjects()
    local target_guid=nil
    for _,obj in ipairs(content) do if string.match(obj.name,term) then target_guid=obj.guid;break end end
    if target_guid then
        local out_pos=self.positionToWorld({0,1.0,0.8})
        my_bowl.takeObject({guid=target_guid,position=out_pos,
            rotation={math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360)},smooth=false})
    else
        broadcastToColor("You don't have ["..term.."] in your bowl.",player_color,"Red")
    end
end
function takeScoop(obj,player_color)
    local hits=Physics.cast({origin=self.getPosition(),direction={0,-1,0},type=3,size={1,1,1},max_distance=2})
    local target_bowl=nil
    for _,hit in ipairs(hits) do if hit.hit_object.tag=="Bag" then target_bowl=hit.hit_object;break end end
    if not target_bowl then broadcastToColor("Bring the spoon closer to a bowl.",player_color,"Red");return end
    
    target_bowl.shuffle()
    
    local content=target_bowl.getObjects()
    if #content==0 then broadcastToColor("That bowl is empty.",player_color,"Yellow");return end
    
    local amount=math.random(3,math.min(8,#content))
    broadcastToColor("You scooped "..amount.." pieces.",player_color,"Green")
    
    local out_pos=self.positionToWorld({0,1.0,0.8})
    for i=1,amount do
        target_bowl.takeObject({position={out_pos.x,out_pos.y+(i*0.4),out_pos.z},
            rotation={math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360)},smooth=false})
    end
end

        for k,_ in pairs(counts) do if string.match(obj.name,k) then counts[k]=counts[k]+1;break end end
    end
    self.editButton({index=1, tooltip="Take Cereal Cookie ("..counts["Cereal Cookie"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=2, tooltip="Take Cereal Fruity ("..counts["Cereal Fruity"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=3, tooltip="Take Cereal Choco ("..counts["Cereal Choco"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=4, tooltip="Take Cereal Frosted ("..counts["Cereal Frosted"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=5, tooltip="Take Cereal Honey ("..counts["Cereal Honey"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=6, tooltip="Take Cereal Candy ("..counts["Cereal Candy"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=7, tooltip="Take Flake ("..counts["Flake"]..")"})
    self.editButton({index=8, tooltip="Take Marshmallow ("..counts["Marshmallow"]..")"})
    return true
end
function sCookie(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Cookie",c) end
function sFruity(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Fruity",c) end
function sChoco(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Choco",c) end
function sFrosted(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Frosted",c) end
function sHoney(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Honey",c) end
function sCandy(o,c) extractPiece("Cereal Candy",c) end
function sFlk(o,c) extractPiece("Flake",c) end
function sMarsh(o,c) extractPiece("Marshmallow",c) end
function extractPiece(term,player_color)
    local owner=self.getName():gsub("Spoon ","")
    local my_bowl=nil
    for _,o in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do if o.getName()=="Bowl "..owner then my_bowl=o;break end end
    if not my_bowl then broadcastToColor("Your bowl was not found.",player_color,"Red");return end
    local content=my_bowl.getObjects()
    local target_guid=nil
    for _,obj in ipairs(content) do if string.match(obj.name,term) then target_guid=obj.guid;break end end
    if target_guid then
        local out_pos=self.positionToWorld({0,1.0,0.8})
        my_bowl.takeObject({guid=target_guid,position=out_pos,
            rotation={math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360)},smooth=false})
    else
        broadcastToColor("You don't have ["..term.."] in your bowl.",player_color,"Red")
    end
end
function takeScoop(obj,player_color)
    local hits=Physics.cast({origin=self.getPosition(),direction={0,-1,0},type=3,size={1,1,1},max_distance=2})
    local target_bowl=nil
    for _,hit in ipairs(hits) do if hit.hit_object.tag=="Bag" then target_bowl=hit.hit_object;break end end
    if not target_bowl then broadcastToColor("Bring the spoon closer to a bowl.",player_color,"Red");return end
    
    target_bowl.shuffle()
    
    local content=target_bowl.getObjects()
    if #content==0 then broadcastToColor("That bowl is empty.",player_color,"Yellow");return end
    
    local amount=math.random(3,math.min(8,#content))
    broadcastToColor("You scooped "..amount.." pieces.",player_color,"Green")
    
    local out_pos=self.positionToWorld({0,1.0,0.8})
    for i=1,amount do
        target_bowl.takeObject({position={out_pos.x,out_pos.y+(i*0.4),out_pos.z},
            rotation={math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360)},smooth=false})
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Model
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    self.setDescription("Central Bowl Extraction Panel")
    local buttons={
        {label="Co",func="sCookie",col="Cereal Cookie",rgb={0.8, 0.6, 0.4},font={0,0,0},p={-0.80,0.8,-0.30}},
        {label="Fr",func="sFruity",col="Cereal Fruity",rgb={1.0, 0.4, 0.6},font={0,0,0},p={-0.27,0.8,-0.30}},
        {label="Ch",func="sChoco",col="Cereal Choco",rgb={0.4, 0.2, 0.1},font={1,1,1},p={0.27,0.8,-0.30}},
        {label="Fs",func="sFrosted",col="Cereal Frosted",rgb={0.9, 0.9, 1.0},font={0,0,0},p={0.80,0.8,-0.30}},
        {label="Ho",func="sHoney",col="Cereal Honey",rgb={1.0, 0.8, 0.2},font={0,0,0},p={-0.60,0.8,0.30}},
        {label="Ca",func="sCandy",col="Cereal Candy",rgb={1.0, 0.2, 0.4},font={1,1,1},p={-0.20,0.8,0.30}},
        {label="Fl",func="sFlk",col="Flake",rgb={0.8,0.8,0.6},font={0,0,0},p={0.20,0.8,0.30}},
        {label="M",func="sMarsh",col="Marshmallow",rgb={1,0.5,0.8},font={0,0,0},p={0.60,0.8,0.30}}
    }
    for _,b in ipairs(buttons) do
        self.createButton({click_function=b.func,function_owner=self,label=b.label,position=b.p,
            width=160,height=160,font_size=90,color=b.rgb,font_color=b.font,
            tooltip="Request "..b.col.." from the center"})
    end
end
function sCookie(o,c) extractCenter("Cereal Cookie",c) end
function sFruity(o,c) extractCenter("Cereal Fruity",c) end
function sChoco(o,c) extractCenter("Cereal Choco",c) end
function sFrosted(o,c) extractCenter("Cereal Frosted",c) end
function sHoney(o,c) extractCenter("Cereal Honey",c) end
function sCandy(o,c) extractCenter("Cereal Candy",c) end
function sFlk(o,c) extractCenter("Flake",c) end
function sMarsh(o,c) extractCenter("Marshmallow",c) end
function extractCenter(term,player_color)
    local cb=nil
    for _,o in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do if o.getName()=="Central Bowl" then cb=o;break end end
    if not cb then broadcastToColor("Error: Central Bowl not found.",player_color,"Red");return end
    local content=cb.getObjects()
    local target_guid=nil
    for _,obj in ipairs(content) do if string.match(obj.name,term) then target_guid=obj.guid;break end end
    if target_guid then
        local out_pos=self.positionToWorld({0,1.0,-1.0})
        cb.takeObject({guid=target_guid,position=out_pos,
            rotation={math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360)},smooth=false})
    else
        broadcastToColor("The Central Bowl is out of ["..term.."].",player_color,"Yellow")
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Model_Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    self.setDescription("Toy Shop Control Panel")
    local buttons={
        {label="T-Co",func="tCookie",col="Toy Cookie",rgb={0.8, 0.6, 0.4},font={0,0,0},p={-0.80,0.8,-0.30}},
        {label="T-Fr",func="tFruity",col="Toy Fruity",rgb={1.0, 0.4, 0.6},font={0,0,0},p={0.00,0.8,-0.30}},
        {label="T-Ch",func="tChoco",col="Toy Choco",rgb={0.4, 0.2, 0.1},font={1,1,1},p={0.80,0.8,-0.30}},
        {label="T-Fs",func="tFrosted",col="Toy Frosted",rgb={0.9, 0.9, 1.0},font={0,0,0},p={-0.60,0.8,0.30}},
        {label="T-Ho",func="tHoney",col="Toy Honey",rgb={1.0, 0.8, 0.2},font={0,0,0},p={0.00,0.8,0.30}},
        {label="T-Ca",func="tCandy",col="Toy Candy",rgb={1.0, 0.2, 0.4},font={1,1,1},p={0.60,0.8,0.30}}
    }
    for _,b in ipairs(buttons) do
        self.createButton({click_function=b.func,function_owner=self,label=b.label,position=b.p,
            width=200,height=200,font_size=90,color=b.rgb,font_color=b.font,
            tooltip="Request "..b.col.." from the Toy Shop"})
    end
end
function tCookie(o,c) extractToy("Toy Cookie",c) end
function tFruity(o,c) extractToy("Toy Fruity",c) end
function tChoco(o,c) extractToy("Toy Choco",c) end
function tFrosted(o,c) extractToy("Toy Frosted",c) end
function tHoney(o,c) extractToy("Toy Honey",c) end
function tCandy(o,c) extractToy("Toy Candy",c) end
function extractToy(term,player_color)
    local ts=nil
    for _,o in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do if o.getName()=="Toy Shop" then ts=o;break end end
    if not ts then broadcastToColor("Error: Toy Shop not found.",player_color,"Red");return end
    local content=ts.getObjects()
    local target_guid=nil
    for _,obj in ipairs(content) do if string.match(obj.name,term) then target_guid=obj.guid;break end end
    if target_guid then
        local out_pos=self.positionToWorld({0,1.0,-1.0})
        ts.takeObject({guid=target_guid,position=out_pos,
            rotation={math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360)},smooth=false})
    else
        broadcastToColor("The Toy Shop is out of ["..term.."].",player_color,"Yellow")
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Model_Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    self.setName("Cereal Box")
    self.setDescription("Discard Bag. Click to pour cereal back to the center.")
    self.createButton({
        click_function="pourCereal", function_owner=self,
        label="Pour\nCereal", position={0,0.5,2.0},
        width=600, height=300, font_size=80, color={1,1,1}, font_color={0,0,0}
    })
end
function filterObjectEnter(obj)
    local n = obj.getName() or ""
    if string.match(n,"Spoon") or string.match(n,"Cuchara") or string.match(n,"Control") or
       string.match(n,"Bowl") or string.match(n,"Tazón") or string.match(n,"Box") or 
       string.match(n,"Figurine") or string.match(n,"Shop") or string.match(n,"Toy") then
        return false
    end
    return true
end
function pourCereal(obj, player_color)
    local cb = nil
    for _,o in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do if o.getName()=="Central Bowl" then cb=o; break end end
    if not cb then broadcastToColor("Error: Central Bowl not found.", player_color, "Red"); return end
    local content = self.getObjects()
    if #content==0 then broadcastToColor("The Cereal Box is empty.", player_color, "Yellow"); return end
    broadcastToColor("Pouring "..#content.." pieces...", player_color, "Green")
    local delay = 0
    local tp = cb.positionToWorld({0,2.0,0})
    for _,item in ipairs(content) do
        Wait.time(function()
            if self~=nil then
                self.takeObject({guid=item.guid,
                    position={tp.x+(math.random(-10,10)*0.05), tp.y, tp.z+(math.random(-10,10)*0.05)},
                    rotation={math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360),math.random(0,360)}, smooth=false})
            end
        end, delay)
        delay = delay + 0.15
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Model_Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    self.setName("Central Bowl")
    self.setDescription("Contains all components ready to play.")
end
function filterObjectEnter(obj)
    local n = obj.getName() or ""
    if string.match(n,"Spoon") or string.match(n,"Cuchara") or string.match(n,"Control") or
       string.match(n,"Bowl") or string.match(n,"Tazón") or string.match(n,"Box") or 
       string.match(n,"Figurine") or string.match(n,"Toy") or string.match(n,"Shop") then
        return false
    end
    return true
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Model_Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    self.setName("Toy Shop")
    self.setDescription("Buy your toys here. Only toys can be stored inside.")
end
function filterObjectEnter(obj)
    local n = obj.getName() or ""
    if string.match(n,"Shop") or string.match(n,"Control") then return false end
    if not string.match(n,"Toy") then
        return false
    end
    return true
end
